mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BILL B JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON B.HO_NO = H.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO WHERE U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND B.BILL_YM = #{billYm}

SELECT H.HO_NO, H.DONG_NO, U.DONG_NM, H.HO, H.HO_STTS_CD, U.DONG_NM || '동 ' || H.HO || '호' AS DISPLAY_DONG_HO FROM APT_DETAIL H JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO WHERE U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND H.HO_STTS_CD IN ('LIVE', 'EMPTY') ORDER BY U.DONG_NM, H.HO

SELECT E.EXPENSE_CD, C.CODE_NAME AS EXPENSE_CD_NM, C.CODE_CONTENT AS EXPENSE_CD_CONTENT, SUM(E.EXPENSE_AMT) AS EXPENSE_AMT FROM EXPENSE E LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE C ON C.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'EXPN_CD' AND C.CODE_NO_CD = E.EXPENSE_CD AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE E.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND E.EXPENSE_YR = #{expenseYr} AND E.EXPENSE_MM = #{expenseMm} GROUP BY E.EXPENSE_CD, C.CODE_NAME, C.CODE_CONTENT, C.SORT_ORDER ORDER BY C.SORT_ORDER
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'BL' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_BILL.NEXTVAL, 7, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BILL ( BILL_NO, HO_NO, BILL_YM, BILL_PBLANC_DT, BILL_TOT_AMT, DUE_DT, PYMT_STTS_CD, PYMT_DT, PYMT_AMT, LATE_FEE_RT, LATE_FEE_AMT ) VALUES ( #{billNo}, #{hoNo}, #{billYm}, SYSDATE, #{billTotAmt}, #{dueDt}, #{pymtSttsCd}, #{pymtDt}, #{pymtAmt}, #{lateFeeRt}, #{lateFeeAmt} )

SELECT 'BD' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_BILL_DETAIL.NEXTVAL, 7, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BILL_DETAIL ( BILL_DETAIL_NO, BILL_NO, BILL_ITEM_CD, BILL_ITEM_AMT, ATCH_FILE_ID ) VALUES ( #{billDetailNo}, #{billNo}, #{billItemCd}, #{billItemAmt}, #{atchFileId} )

INSERT INTO BILL ( BILL_NO, HO_NO, BILL_YM, BILL_PBLANC_DT, BILL_TOT_AMT, DUE_DT, PYMT_STTS_CD, PYMT_DT, PYMT_AMT, LATE_FEE_RT, LATE_FEE_AMT ) SELECT 'BL' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_BILL.NEXTVAL, 7, '0') AS BILL_NO, H.HO_NO, #{billYm} AS BILL_YM, SYSDATE AS BILL_PBLANC_DT, 0 AS BILL_TOT_AMT, #{dueDt} AS DUE_DT, 'READY' AS PYMT_STTS_CD, NULL AS PYMT_DT, NULL AS PYMT_AMT, 0.0300 AS LATE_FEE_RT, 0 AS LATE_FEE_AMT FROM APT_DETAIL H JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO WHERE U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND H.HO_STTS_CD IN ('LIVE', 'EMPTY') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BILL B WHERE B.HO_NO = H.HO_NO AND B.BILL_YM = #{billYm} )

INSERT INTO BILL_DETAIL ( BILL_DETAIL_NO, BILL_NO, BILL_ITEM_CD, BILL_ITEM_AMT, ATCH_FILE_ID ) WITH TARGET_CNT AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM APT_DETAIL H JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO WHERE U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND H.HO_STTS_CD IN ('LIVE', 'EMPTY') ), EXPENSE_ITEM AS ( SELECT E.EXPENSE_CD AS BILL_ITEM_CD, SUM(E.EXPENSE_AMT) AS ITEM_TOTAL_AMT FROM EXPENSE E WHERE E.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND E.EXPENSE_YR || LPAD(E.EXPENSE_MM, 2, '0') = #{billYm} GROUP BY E.EXPENSE_CD ) SELECT 'BD' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_BILL_DETAIL.NEXTVAL, 7, '0') AS BILL_DETAIL_NO, B.BILL_NO, E.BILL_ITEM_CD, TRUNC(E.ITEM_TOTAL_AMT / T.CNT) AS BILL_ITEM_AMT, NULL AS ATCH_FILE_ID FROM BILL B JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON B.HO_NO = H.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO CROSS JOIN TARGET_CNT T JOIN EXPENSE_ITEM E ON 1 = 1 WHERE U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND B.BILL_YM = #{billYm} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BILL_DETAIL BD WHERE BD.BILL_NO = B.BILL_NO AND BD.BILL_ITEM_CD = E.BILL_ITEM_CD )

INSERT INTO BILL_DETAIL ( BILL_DETAIL_NO, BILL_NO, BILL_ITEM_CD, BILL_ITEM_AMT, ATCH_FILE_ID ) WITH METER_CHARGE AS ( SELECT M.HO_NO, CASE F.FACILITY_TY_CD WHEN 'ELC' THEN 'ELC' WHEN 'WTR' THEN 'WTR' WHEN 'GAS' THEN 'GAS' END AS BILL_ITEM_CD, CASE F.FACILITY_TY_CD WHEN 'ELC' THEN (M.CURR_VAL - M.PRE_VAL) * 130 WHEN 'WTR' THEN (M.CURR_VAL - M.PRE_VAL) * 900 WHEN 'GAS' THEN (M.CURR_VAL - M.PRE_VAL) * 1100 ELSE 0 END AS CHARGE_AMT FROM METER_HSTRY M JOIN FACILITY F ON M.FACILITY_NO = F.FACILITY_NO JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON M.HO_NO = H.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO WHERE U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND M.METER_DT >= TO_DATE(#{billYm} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.METER_DT < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{billYm} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD'), 1) AND F.FACILITY_TY_CD IN ('ELC', 'WTR', 'GAS') AND M.CURR_VAL IS NOT NULL AND M.PRE_VAL IS NOT NULL ) SELECT 'BD' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_BILL_DETAIL.NEXTVAL, 7, '0') AS BILL_DETAIL_NO, B.BILL_NO, MC.BILL_ITEM_CD, MC.CHARGE_AMT AS BILL_ITEM_AMT, NULL AS ATCH_FILE_ID FROM BILL B JOIN METER_CHARGE MC ON B.HO_NO = MC.HO_NO WHERE B.BILL_YM = #{billYm} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BILL_DETAIL BD WHERE BD.BILL_NO = B.BILL_NO AND BD.BILL_ITEM_CD = MC.BILL_ITEM_CD )
mapper.update: UPDATE BILL B SET B.BILL_TOT_AMT = ( SELECT NVL(SUM(BD.BILL_ITEM_AMT), 0) FROM BILL_DETAIL BD WHERE BD.BILL_NO = B.BILL_NO ) WHERE B.BILL_YM = #{billYm} AND B.HO_NO IN ( SELECT H.HO_NO FROM APT_DETAIL H JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO WHERE U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} )
